channel.title: Persuasion on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Persuasion on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: The Hardest Sell: Convincing Someone You’re Not What You Used to Be
item.description:
A worthwhile listen on the art of persuasion even if the main subject discussed is unpleasant.

Ep. 276 – Scott Adams: The Hardest Sell: Convincing Someone You’re Not What You Used to Be – Altucher Confidential
